[[File:SupergirlEventPicFromVideo.png|thumb|479x479px|Current seasonal event for June 2026: [[Supergirl]]]] '''Seasonal Events''' are monthly events where users can earn rewards every day by energizing their Finch. Every event has its own theme, with themed [[clothing]] items, [[furniture]] and interior items, and a [[Micropets|Micropet]]. The Seasonal Event appears at the top of the [[Quests]] tab. It has a list of all the days of the month, and chests or [[Rainbow Stones]] next to each. [[Finch Plus]] members who support the developers get an additional gift each day, in their choice of any color, and are guaranteed to get all items. The micropet is given on the 25th day, or the 20th for [[Finch Plus]] members. As of April 2026, there have been 43 seasonal events. This article contains a master list of all seasonal events. ==During the Event== All users receive a reward each day they fully energize their birb. ===Chests=== File:OrangeChest.jpeg|Orange - Random clothing item File:PurpleChest.jpeg|Purple - Random furniture item File:BlackChest.jpeg|Black - 88% chance event item, 12% chance Rainbow stones File:RainbowStonesClaimed.jpeg|Claimed Rainbow Stones === Free Rewards=== Rewards for Free players are in the left column. They will be mystery chests or rainbow stones. Orange chests contain a random clothing item, and purple chests contain a random furniture item. Black chests either contain a random clothing item, a random furniture item, or a 12% chance of rainbow stones. If the user receives clothing or furniture from a chest, they can choose the color of the item from four designated color choices. These predetermined colors are announced during the Seasonal Event announcement and included in the event page. Because items are random, users may receive more than one of the same item. They might also not receive some items. (See [[#Availability|After the Event Availability]] for information on purchasing event items.) On reaching their 25th reward day, Free users are able to claim the event's pictured [[Micropets|micropet]][[File:FreeRewardsUnclaimed.jpeg|thumb|414x414px|Unclaimed Free Reward (Random)     /     Locked member reward |none]]
[[File:FreeMicropetReward.jpeg|none|thumb|414x414px|Free Micropet Reward on day 25    /    Locked member reward]] ===Plus Rewards=== [[File:SeasonalRewardColumnsFreeandPlus.png|thumb]][[Finch Plus]] members who support the developers are eligible to receive all of the rewards in both columns, Free and Plus. The Free column reward chests still offer only four color choices, but the Plus column rewards allow the user to choose the color of the item from ten color choices. The first 25 or so Plus rewards are specific items (and the micropet), not chests. If a Plus user fully energizes their birb the number of days as there are items, they will be able to receive every seasonal event item. After all items are received, the remaining rewards for Plus users are mystery chests. Unlike Free column chests, if a user receives clothing or furniture from a Plus column chest, they can still choose the color of the item from all ten color choices. On the 20th reward day, Plus users are able to hatch the month's micropet. [[File:PlusRewardsUnclaimed.jpeg|thumb|414x414px|Unclaimed Plus Rewards|none]]
[[File:PlusMicropetAward.jpeg|none|thumb|414x414px|Plus Micropet Reward on Day 20]] ===Disabling Seasonal Events=== If a user does not want to participate in a month's Seasonal Event, Seasonal Events can be disabled. Use the home page top left Settings icon, and go to Account Preferences. Choose Seasonal Events, and turn off the Enable toggle. ==After the Event == ===Claiming Earned Rewards=== [[File:AfterEventClaimRewards.jpg|thumb]]All users have two weeks after the event ends to claim earned rewards. You will only get rewards up to the number of days you participated. In the Settings Menu at the top left of the Home screen, select the temporary Season Event "Claim your rewards" bar. It disappears when (a) you have claimed all of your earned rewards or (b) the two-week claim window ends.Alternatively, you can scroll down to the Account section, select the Preferences button and click on "Seasonal Events." The "Claim rewards from last event" option is always visible, even outside the two week window.File:SettingsAccountPreferences.png File:PreferencesMenuSeasonalEvents.png File:PreferencesSeasonalEventsClaimRewards.png ===Availability === During the month immediately following the event, the items will frequently be offered at random in [[Mr. Prickles' Shop]] and [[Finkea Furnishings]]. If a user missed the event or was unable to get certain items, they may be purchased in the shops using [[Rainbow Stones|rainbow stones]]. After that, Seasonal Event items appear in the rare item rotation in the shops at random throughout the year. They will appear more frequently during their anniversary month; if the item was released in September, it will appear more frequently in September. However, October and December Seasonal Event items *only* appear in the rare item rotation in the shop during their anniversary months, and the two weeks leading up to them. Items can also be sold in the shop for half price. Some users might not achieve enough full-energy days to receive the micropet. Continue to get and hatch eggs from [[Professor Oat's Lab]] as usual; you may eventually get one at random, or a color variant. ==Seasonal Events == ===2022 Seasonal Events=== {| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed fandom-table" style="text-align:center;
